hypothesis.thesis_statement: Paper 'The Sound of Risk: A Multimodal Physics-Informed Acoustic Model for Forecasting Market Volatility and Enhancing Market Interpretability' (arXiv:2508.18653) proposes a signal in the 'earnings_events' dimension. Hypothesis: an A-share adaptation predicts the cross-section of forward returns. Test whether the published effect ports to A-shares.
hypothesis.mechanism: Taxonomy dimension: earnings_events (FRONTIER_OPEN). Buildable on: earnings_preannounce(forecast/express); fundamentals(income/balancesheet/cashflow/pit_fundamentals/indicators). Abstract: Information asymmetry in financial markets, often amplified by strategically crafted corporate narratives, undermines the effectiveness of conventional textual analysis. We propose a novel multimodal framework for financial risk assessment that integrates textual sentiment with paralinguistic cues derived from executive vocal tract dynamics in earnings calls. source.title: The Sound of Risk: A Multimodal Physics-Informed Acoustic Model for Forecasting Market Volatility and Enhancing Market Interpretability

pre_registered_concerns.most_likely_failure_mode: [DRAFT] The paper's effect may not survive A-share microstructure (T+1, limit boards, retail flow) or may be subsumed by existing factors after neutralization.
pre_registered_concerns.weakest_assumption: [DRAFT] That the paper's construction maps faithfully to Tushare A-share fields without definitional drift.
pre_registered_concerns.what_would_falsify_this: [DRAFT] Sealed-OOS rank-ICIR below the committed band, or hard rules failing after realistic costs.
pre_registered_concerns.priors_on_cost_sensitivity: [DRAFT] Review turnover at the chosen rebalance.

arxiv_evidence_context_only.abstract: Information asymmetry in financial markets, often amplified by strategically crafted corporate narratives, undermines the effectiveness of conventional textual analysis. We propose a novel multimodal framework for financial risk assessment that integrates textual sentiment with paralinguistic cues derived from executive vocal tract dynamics in earnings calls. Central to this framework is the Physics-Informed Acoustic Model (PIAM), which applies nonlinear acoustics to robustly extract emotional signatures from raw teleconference sound subject to distortions such as signal clipping. Both acoustic and textual emotional states are projected onto an interpretable three-dimensional Affective State…

todo_before_registering: Read the full paper; extract the EXACT signal construction.
Implement 'arxiv_earnings_events_2508_18653' in factor_library mapping it to A-share Tushare/Qlib fields (PIT-safe Ref(...,1)); confirm fields are registered/approved.
Run the SANDBOX screen + size/industry-neutralized MARGINAL-contribution test vs the catalog (marginal IC × low correlation — the house rule), NOT standalone ICIR.
SET expected_effect = YOUR A-share prediction (point + CI + horizon).
CONFIRM the OOS window is unburned, then factor_lifecycle (draft→candidate) → sealed-OOS.
